meta.title: Contact Essentia | Get in Touch
meta.description: Contact Essentia's team in Tenerife to learn more about our longevity center, wellness programs, and membership options.

heading: Get in touch.
subheading: Whether you want to learn more about membership, book a session, or just ask a question: we'd love to hear from you.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about what you're looking for...

success.heading: Message received.
success.body: Thank you for reaching out. A member of our team will get back to you within one business day.
